title: Meralco Signs 20-year Deal with First Quezon Biogas for Renewable Energy Supply
content: The Manila Electric Company (Meralco) has signed a 20-year power supply agreement with First Quezon Biogas Corporation (FQBC) for a renewable energy supply of 1.25 megawatts, starting July 26, 2026, reports Philippine News Agency. In a statement issued Monday, Meralco confirmed that the agreement will utilize most of the 1.4 MW capacity of FQBCâ€™s biogas plant located in Candelaria, Quezon. The partnership supports the Department of Energyâ€™s push to increase the countryâ€™s use of renewable energy. Under its targets, the DOE aims to raise the share of renewables in the national energy mix to 35% by 2030 and 50% by 2040.
author: Analysts Account
